records.ety: [F. l'herbe de Saint Pierre. See Saint, and Petrel.]

defs: A fleshy, suffrutescent, umbelliferous European plant (Crithmum maritimum). It grows among rocks and on cliffs along the seacoast, and is used for pickles.
The species of glasswort (Salicornia herbacea); -- called in England marsh samphire.
A seashore shrub (Borrichia arborescens) of the West Indies.
quotes: Hangs one that gathers samphire, dreadful trade!
